title: Hinduism Secrets, Ancient Mysteries & Untold Ramayan - Author Akshat Gupta On The Rich Podcast
description:
In this special podcast episode, we speak with renowned author Akshat Gupta about Hinduism's secrets, ancient mysteries and the untold Ramayan. 

Akshat Gupta is a National bestselling author, screenwriter, lyricist, poet and Historian from Indore, currently based in Bombay.
1,00,000 copies sold of the book. 
•Awarded by Golden Iconic awards. 
•Author of a trilogy based on mythology and science fiction titled 'The Hidden Hindu'. The visual rights to The Hidden Hindu are acquired by "Dhoni Entertainment Pvt Ltd."

•Publishing rights to Penguin House
• Akshat has signed 7 films and a couple of Web series signed with well-known production houses in Bollywood.
• Professional lyricist with 6 songs signed by Mrs. Lata Rajnikanth.

Do you want to know what secrets Hinduism holds? Do you want to know what the ancient mysteries are? Then this is the podcast for you! Akshat Gupta is a renowned author and he's here to share his insights on Hinduism, the Ramayan, and the secrets that lie within. Listen in to learn about the rich history and tradition of Hinduism

In this revealing Hinduism Secrets, Ancient Mysteries & Untold Ramayan interview, bestselling author Akshat Gupta divulges the hidden secrets of Hinduism, including its ties to alien life, the ancient mysteries, and the epic Ramayan.

In this full-length interview, Akshat Gupta discusses his new book Hinduism Secrets, Ancient Mysteries & Untold Ramayan, which discloses hidden truths about Hinduism that nobody has ever known before. From secret ties between Hinduism and alien life to ancient mysteries, this book is a must-read for anyone interested in Hinduism, Ramayan, ancient mysteries, and more.

Welcome to "The Rich" podcast, where we unravel the secrets of Hinduism, delve into ancient mysteries, and uncover the untold stories of the Ramayana! In this captivating episode titled "Hinduism Secrets, Ancient Mysteries & Untold Ramayan With Author Akshat Gupta," your host Ashutosh Pratihast engages in an enlightening conversation with the esteemed author Akshat Gupta.

Join us for an intellectual journey into the depths of Hinduism, as Akshat Gupta, a renowned authority on ancient Indian scriptures, shares profound insights into the esoteric aspects of this millennia-old faith. Discover hidden facets of Hinduism that have shaped cultures, civilizations, and spiritual practices for generations.

Host Ashutosh Pratihast leads the conversation with finesse, delving into the depths of ancient wisdom and unearthing gems of knowledge that have the potential to reshape our perspectives on spirituality, culture, and the interconnectedness of human existence.

If you're a seeker of knowledge, a lover of history, or simply curious about the profound dimensions of Hinduism and the Ramayana, this podcast episode is a must-listen. Like, share, and subscribe to "The Rich" channel for more engaging discussions that bridge the gap between tradition and modern thought.

Join us on this intellectual odyssey as we explore "Hinduism Secrets, Ancient Mysteries & Untold Ramayan With Author Akshat Gupta," hosted by Ashutosh Pratihast. Enrich your understanding and expand your horizons with "The Rich" podcast!
